subsection.heading: Board of Directors.—
subsection.content: The board of directors and the responsibilities of the board are as provided in the articles of incorporation.

subsection.heading: Officers.—
subsection.content: The officers and the election of officers are as provided in the articles of incorporation.

subsection.heading: Nondiscrimination.—
subsection.content: The requirements for holding office in the corporation may not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, disability, or national origin.

html:tr.style: font-size:6pt; border-bottom:1px solid black; border-top:1px solid black; -uslm-lc:h1;

html:th.style: min-width: 44.0pt; text-align:center; vertical-align:middle; border-right:1px solid black;

width:94.0pt ; max-width:94.0pt; text-align:center; vertical-align:middle; border-left:1px solid black;

html:td.style: text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-right:1px solid black; padding-right:2pt;
text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-right:1px solid black; border-left:1px solid black; padding-right:2pt; padding-left: 2pt;
text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-left:1px solid black; padding-left: 2pt;
html:td.html:p: Nov. 5, 1990, Pub. L. 101–510, title XVI, §§ 1605(b) (related to discrimination in holding office), 1606, 1607, 104 Stat. 1737.

html:td.style: text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-right:1px solid black; padding-right:2pt;
text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-right:1px solid black; border-left:1px solid black; padding-right:2pt; padding-left: 2pt;
text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-left:1px solid black; padding-left: 2pt;
text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-right:1px solid black; padding-right:2pt;
text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-right:1px solid black; border-left:1px solid black; padding-right:2pt; padding-left: 2pt;
text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-left:1px solid black; padding-left: 2pt;

note.p: In subsections (a) and (b), the words “and shall be in conformity with the laws of the State or States in which it is incorporated” are omitted as unnecessary.
